emails.subject: FW: Outlook Migration for Bill Rapp
emails.body: FW: Outlook Migration for Bill Rapp Bill, you will be migrated to our LAN Tuesday night and be able to access the ETS Lan Microsoft Outlook on Wednesday morning. They told me you should be able to access Outlook on the EES LAN Monday and Tuesday until then, so hopefully you won't miss any messages. I'm taking a vacation day tomorrow but will be back Monday, so if you have any questions or problems tomorrow, please call Denise Lagesse at 3-6704 or Ruth Mann at 3-3595 and they can help you....See you Monday!!!! Emily Sellers Enron Transportation Services Legal 1400 Smith Street, EB4771 Houston, Tx 77001713) 853-7172 (713) 646-2738 emily.sellers@enron.com <mail

emails.subject: FW: Outlook Migration for Bill Rapp
emails.body: FW: Outlook Migration for Bill Rapp Bill, your password will be same as it was on the EES LAN......so you log on as usual....hopefully you'll get your laptop and equipment this afternoon.............. Emily Sellers Enron Transportation Services Legal 1400 Smith Street, EB4771 Houston, Tx 77001713) 853-7172 (713) 646-2738 emily.sellers@enron.com <mail
